title: Difference between DPI function and task result

features.name: dpi_c_task_output_in_always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clock) procedural block containing a DPI-C task-like function call with an output argument, where the output is also assigned to a register in the same clock edge.

features.name: dpi_c_function_return_vs_output_param
features.description: Code should include two DPI-C function calls with equivalent behavior but different calling conventions (return value vs output parameter), used in the same always @(posedge clock) block to expose scheduling differences.
